== Notes for [[Item:Q98344|Q98344]] ==



David ,

son of Akkub and nn to: nn

1) Shlomo to: nn

--------------------
source: http://www.geni.com/people/Da-ud-ibn-Akkub/6000000000795553508?through=6000000000795687204

David ,

son of Akkub and nn to: nn

1) Shlomo to: nn

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
6702EFBBAF5801EFBBF89829A6488A4D435A
geni:6000000000795553508

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
